albums.title: Halfway There, Nowhere Near
albums.description: This album has been cooking for the past year and a half. After the release of Dubs for Weary Revolutionaries I began working on another synthpunk album. This album is mostly pretty fast and noisy, but it has some surprises, too.
albums.longDescription: This album has been cooking for the past year and a half. After the release of Dubs for Weary Revolutionaries I began working on another synthpunk album. I was somewhat distracted by the Hi! Friends Across the Sea project (which was totally worth it and you should go listen to that album, too), but I returned to recording last Winter and here we are. This album is mostly pretty fast and noisy, but it has some surprises, too. I hope you enjoy. Please share the music if you like it.
albums.credits: All songs written and performed by Shawn Rider except where noted. Jackpot Ferrari provides vocals on Misanthropic Drunken Loner and Kiss Me Son of God.

albums.title: Hi! Friends Across the Sea!
albums.description: A split album between The Burgers and Harder Wins. We have forged a friendship across the sea built on folk punk and angst. What you are listening to now comes from the heart.
albums.longDescription: This album is split between The Burgers and Harder Wins. We have forged a friendship across the sea built on folk punk and angst. What you are listening to now comes from the heart. We hope you enjoy it. All Burgers songs are written, performed, and recorded by ZacCheng Lee in Beijing, China. All Harder Wins songs are written, performed, and recorded by Shawn Rider in Seattle, USA.
albums.credits: The Burgers: ZacCheng Lee (Beijing, China). Harder Wins: Shawn Rider (Seattle, USA).

albums.title: Dubs for Weary Revolutionaries
albums.description: Dub reggae for the tired revolutionary. Bass, echo, and resistance. AI is for all of us.
albums.longDescription: Dub reggae for the tired revolutionary. Heavy bass, deep echo, and the spirit of resistance. The revolution needs a soundtrack and sometimes you need to rest before you can rise again. All tracks composed, performed, recorded, and mixed by Shawn Rider in Seattle.
albums.credits: Composed, performed, recorded, and engineered by Shawn Rider.

albums.title: Lockdown Drill
albums.description: Folk punk and synthpunk from Seattle. Available on streaming services and limited-run cassette tapes via Bandcamp.
albums.longDescription: Folk punk and synthpunk from Seattle. The debut full-length from Harder Wins. Available on streaming services and a limited run of cassette tapes is available via Bandcamp.
albums.credits: All songs written, performed, recorded, and engineered by Shawn Rider.

albums.title: Instrumental Classics vol. One
albums.description: Instrumental classics across many genres: hip hop, cyber jazz, lofi, chillstep, synthwave, dub, and more. Songs for getting things done.
albums.longDescription: Instrumental Classics across many genres: hip hop, cyber jazz, lofi, chillstep, synthwave, dub, and more! Songs for getting things done. Composed, performed, recorded, and engineered by Shawn Rider.
albums.credits: Composed, performed, recorded, and engineered by Shawn Rider.

site.title: Harder Wins
site.description: Music by Shawn Rider. Folk punk, synthpunk, dub, and more from Seattle.
